rating.description: The rating of the chatbot response

ratingReason.description: The reason for a negative rating (required when rating is negative)

ratingComment.description: Optional free text comment for the rating
ratingComment.example: The answer was missing important details about configuration.

query.description: Trimmed preview of the first query in the chat thread
query.example: How do I configure email archiv...

updatedAt.description: Date and time of last update

label.description: The label/description of the system task

status.description: The current status of the system task

result.description: The result of the system task
